description: Hand-curated expectations for the platform engineering Slack standup. Tests adversarial robustness: real product asks are mixed with off-topic chatter (coffee machine, TV show, lunch, vacation). The synthesis must pick up only the real product work.

required_topics.rationale: In-portal invoice payment (Apple Pay + credit card) for client accounts was the dominant product thread of the week.
Thursday introduced a small client ops ask for the order delivery date on the PartnerPortal home screen.

forbidden_topics.rationale: Coffee machine maintenance is workplace chatter, not a product story. System must ignore.

expected_duplicates.rationale: The team explicitly identified QT-251 in the chat and said 'don't write a new story'. The synthesis must echo that by flagging any order-preference ranking story as a duplicate of QT-251.
QT-243 is the existing in-portal invoice payment ticket. New stories on this theme should be flagged as overlapping.
